urdf_source.conversion_notes: Kinematics and meshes preserved. Dynamics parameters (damping, armature, solver settings) are MuJoCo-specific and not represented in URDF.

notes: Floating base with 6-DoF free joint at root. /qpos covers the 12 leg joints only; /base_pose carries the floating base state. Trajectory qpos columns follow joint_names order above; this is the URDF order, which differs from the raw Unitree SDK motorState[] indexing (FR,FL,RL,RR → FR,FL,RR,RL).
